pi_items.source: Confirmed by setup_task.sh which creates /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD directory
Confirmed by setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which reference this path

Verified via FreeCAD documentation and Ubuntu font standards. DejaVuSans.ttf version 2.37 (TrueType format) is the standard font file location on Ubuntu/Linux systems installed via fonts-dejavu-core package
Confirmed in task.json description and verified in verifier.py line 87 (checks for 'ROBOT-01' or 'ROBOT' in FCStd XML content)
Calculated as base plate volume: 100mm × 30mm × 3mm = 9000 mm³. Verified in task.json description.

Reasonable upper bound allowing text extrusion volume of up to 7000 mm³ beyond the 9000 mm³ base plate. Estimated text volume for 'ROBOT-01' at 12mm font height × 2mm extrusion is approximately 1200-1500 mm³, well within range.
Lower bound for X dimension check in verifier.py line 160. Expected base width is 100mm, text may affect total width but 85 is a reasonable minimum threshold.
Upper bound for X dimension check in verifier.py line 160. Allows flexibility for text positioning and geometry variations beyond the base 100mm width.
Lower bound for Y dimension check in verifier.py line 161. Expected base depth is 30mm, text height 12mm, total ~30mm, so 15 is a reasonable minimum threshold.
Upper bound for Y dimension check in verifier.py line 161. Provides flexibility for text positioning and geometry variations.
Lower bound for Z dimension check in verifier.py line 162. Base plate height is 3mm, text extrusion adds 2mm for total 5mm expected height.
Upper bound for Z dimension check in verifier.py line 162. Expected Z dimension is 5mm (3mm base + 2mm text extrusion), 8mm allows for reasonable variation.

privileged_info_summary: The create_3d_nameplate task creates a 3D-printable nameplate in FreeCAD with the text 'ROBOT-01' extruded on a rectangular base plate. The task uses the DejaVuSans.ttf font located at /usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans.ttf (TrueType version 2.37), which is the standard Ubuntu system font. The base plate has dimensions 100mm × 30mm × 3mm (volume: 9000 mm³). The text is 12mm font height extruded 2mm upward, adding approximately 1200-1500 mm³ of volume. Final files are saved as FCStd project file and STL mesh at /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/nameplate.*. All metadata values for volume constraints (9000-16000 mm³) and bounding box dimension ranges (85-120 × 15-45 × 3-8 mm) are geometrically consistent and verified.
